description: Special attack handler field analysis from Ghidra MCP reverse engineering

SuicideDroneHandler.description: Handles suicide drone attacks that destroy both the attacker and deal massive damage to target

0x10.name: BaseSkill
0x10.description: Reference to parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

0x58.name: (none)
0x58.description: No additional fields - inherits basic BaseEffect layout

OnApply.description: Deals 999 fixed damage to target element, destroys attacker GameObject, invokes OnDeath if element count reaches 0

OnBeforeApply.description: Calculates movement path from current position to target tile, initiates MoveTo with travel time calculation

OnUse.description: Simple flag setter, sets output parameter to true

Create.description: Factory method creating handler instance, stores effect template at +0x18

MoveAndSelfDestroyHandler.description: Advanced suicide attack with animation triggers and VFX spawning (used by hovermines)

0x10.name: BaseSkill
0x10.description: Reference to parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

0x58.name: AnimatorTrigger
0x58.description: Animator parameter for attack animation trigger

0x68.name: MovementDuration
0x68.description: Extra time added to movement duration for timing

OnApply.description: Calculates direction vector, retrieves target actor, delegates to KillAttackingElement

OnBeforeApply.description: Handles movement with 0.8 lerp for impact point, triggers attack animation, sets up death callback

KillAttackingElement.description: Spawns death VFX from actor+0x228, deals 999 damage, destroys attacker GameObject

OnVerifyTarget.description: Validates target using pathfinding with flags 0x2329, max 3 tiles distance

ctor.description: Constructor initializing List<Vector3> at +0x20 with capacity 4

Create.description: Factory method creating handler and path list

ReturnOfServeHandler.description: Intercepts incoming projectile attacks and returns fire at the attacker

0x10.name: BaseSkill
0x10.description: Reference to parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

0x20.name: InterceptedSkill
0x20.description: Reference to skill that was intercepted (set during OnShouldCancelImpact)

0x28.name: AttackerTile
0x28.description: Tile position of the attacking entity for return fire targeting

0x58.name: ConsumeOnUse
0x58.description: If true, removes parent skill after successful interception and counter-attack

OnShouldCancelImpact.description: Intercepts attacks with tag 0x29 (Missile/Projectile) from enemies, stores skill and attacker info, registers callback

OnAfterSkillUse.description: Callback after intercepted skill completes, creates skill copy, sets IsReturnFire flag (skill+0xdd), fires at attacker

ThrivingUnderPressureHandler.description: Passive effect that stacks bonuses each time the unit is targeted by attacks

0x10.name: BaseSkill
0x10.description: Reference to parent skill (inherited from SkillEventHandler)

0x20.name: CurrentStacks
0x20.description: Runtime counter tracking number of times targeted (capped by MaxStacks)

0x58.name: MaxStacks
0x58.description: Maximum number of stacks that can be accumulated (default: 10)

OnBeingTargetedByAttack.description: Increments CurrentStacks each time targeted, capped at MaxStacks

IsUsable.description: Returns true when CurrentStacks equals MaxStacks (max reached)

ctor.description: Effect template constructor, sets MaxStacks default to 10
